chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.511 of 2024 (Muhammad Ali v. The State and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on MA No.6422/2024 2. For orders on MA No.6423/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on MA No.6424/2024 17.05.2024 Mr. Farooq Rashid, advocate for the applicant ========= 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Notice to the Prosecutor General Sindh and the private respondent. To be fixed after two weeks. J U D G E Nadir*
